Terms & Conditions: Payment terms, timelines, deliverables, etc Subcontractor Management: Subcontractor Details: Contact info, specialties, and ratings; Work Assignments: What portions of the project are outsourced Stakeholder Communication: Client/Sales/Supplier Communication: Updates, feedback, and approvals; Internal Communication: Between teams, departments, or unitsSafety & Quality Assurance : Safety Protocols: guidelines & measures Inspections: quality and adherence to standards Incident Reports: on -site accidents or mishaps Supply Chain & Logistics: Suppliers: materials and equipment providers Order Tracking: Timelines, deliveries, shipments Storage & Warehousing: locations and capacities Site Management: Site Details: Location, area, terrain specifics Site Facilities: Amenities for workers like housing, sanitation, waste, security, etc Warranty & Maintenance: Post -construction Services: Details about the warranty period, terms, and services Maintenance Schedule: checks, repairsSustainability & Environment: Eco-friendly Materials: Use of sustainable or recycled materials; Waste Management: Disposal and recycling practices Reporting & Analytics: Progress Reports: Regular updates on the project's status; Performance Metrics: KPIs related to timeline adherence, budgeting, safety Customers: customer ID, name, contact information, purchase history, segmentation or classification data (e.g., VIP, regular, one -time buyer).Products: products or services being sold, including product ID, description, category, pricing, Developer, Estate, Land Release, etc Sales Transactions: each sale, with details such as transaction ID, date, customer, products/services sold, total price, discounts , and payment method. Returns & Refunds: Details about product returns, reasons for the return, associated refunds, and restocking.Payment: methods of payment (credit card, cash, bank transfer, etc.), payment status (paid, pending, overdue), and potentially payment history for each customer. Sales Channels & Territories: Specifies where the sale took place, be it online platforms, physical stores, direct sales, partners, or other channels. Feedback & Reviews: Customer feedback, product reviews, or ratings post -purchase; Testimonials; ReferralsSales Representatives/Teams: Information about the salespeople or teams, including their targets, performance metrics, regions or territories, and associated sales. Construction (Job) Delivery Status: Information about building process, build status, tracking , costs, payments and progress and stakeholder/customer communication Reporting & Analytics Forecasts & Targets: Predictions about future sales and set goals for sales teams. KPI's: Targets and Performance TrackingPromotions & Discounts: Details about any sales promotions, coupons, or discounts offered, including their valid dates, terms, and effects on pricing.Notes:
